home.name: Home
home.description: You are in your house. Your beloved pet alligator is unconscious on the bed. The exit door is to the north.

items.name: Rations
items.description: A pack of rations. Restores 10 health.

road1.name: Main Road (1)
road1.description: The main road stretches far beyond your sight. The forest around you is quiet. The path leads north and a dirt path leads west.
